title: Greatsword of Radahn (Light)
description: A light greatsword wielded by Radahn, Consort of Miquella. One of the paired swords of the promised consort, imbued with the golden light of Miquella's Order. Its blade shimmers with a radiance that speaks to the union of strength and devotion.

title: Poleblade of the Bud
description: A paired curved sword used by Romina, Saint of the Bud. The blades are entwined with scarlet rot blossoms, blooming even in death. Romina carried these weapons as extensions of her devotion to the spreading bud, and they carry the sickly sweet rot of her grace.

title: Star-Lined Sword
description: A straight sword found among the ruins of Castle Ensis, its blade etched with constellations that glow faintly under moonlight. Said to have been forged by the knights of Caria who once held this fortress, the sword channels cold lunar energy through its starlit engravings.

title: Milady
description: An elegant light greatsword of refined make, discovered within the depths of Belurat Tower Settlement. Its slender blade is suited to swift, graceful attacks and carries an air of noble bearing. A weapon favored by those who prize technique over brute force.

title: Euporia
description: A straight sword of divine craftsmanship, gifted by Miquella himself to those he deemed worthy of his love. Its blade hums with a golden warmth that compels obedience and affection, binding the bearer to Miquella's singular will. Few weapons carry such intimate and unsettling grace.

title: Shadow Sunflower Blossom
description: A curved sword fashioned from the shadow sunflowers that bloom in the Realm of Shadow. The blade's edge pulses with a dim, occult energy drawn from the land itself. Its unusual form and dark luminescence mark it as a weapon born of this sunless realm.

title: Ancient Meteoric Ore Greatsword
description: A massive greatsword forged from meteoric ore of ancient origin, discovered deep within the Ruined Forge Lava Intake. The blade is dense with gravitational power, its dark iron surface etched with runes that predate the Erdtree itself. Heavy beyond measure, yet crackling with primeval force.

title: Dryleaf Arts
description: The martial art techniques of Dryleaf Dane, distilled into a fighting style that weaponizes the hands and feet with devastating precision. Dane honed this art through solitary discipline, stripping away all ornamentation to leave only pure, lethal motion. A reminder that the body itself is the oldest weapon.

title: Dragon-Hunter's Great Katana
description: A great katana wielded by Igon, whose consuming hatred of Bayle the Dread drove him to the heights of the Jagged Peak. The blade is scarred and worn from countless desperate strikes against dragonflesh, carrying the furious resolve of a man who refused to die before his quarry.

title: Perfumer's Talisman Bottle
description: A perfume bottle repurposed as a weapon, used by the perfumers of the Scadu Altus region to project volatile alchemical concoctions against enemies. The glass vessel is reinforced with alchemical resin and etched with the sigils of the Shadow Keep's perfumer order.

title: Backhand Blade
description: A slender blade designed to be held with the edge facing outward from the back of the hand, enabling swift reversing cuts that confound opponents. Found among the ruins of the Gravesite Plain, this weapon speaks to a fighting tradition unique to the warriors of the Realm of Shadow.

title: Frenzied Flame Seal
description: A finger seal saturated with the power of the Frenzied Flame, claimed from Midra, Lord of Frenzied Flame, deep within the Abyssal Woods. The seal writhes with unbound hysteria, amplifying incantations of frenzy to a terrifying degree. To hold it is to feel the flame's maddening warmth creeping into the mind.
